debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : DecidableEq α
M : Matroid α
hM : M.IsRegular
hM' : M.RankFinite
⊢ M.IsGood

failed_attempts:
induction hM using Matroid.IsRegular.inductionOn hM'
  case graphic => exact IsGood.graphic
  case cographic => exact IsGood.cographic
  case R10 => exact IsGood.R10
  case sum => exact IsGood.sum ‹_› ‹_› ‹_›

induction hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on_size generalizing hM with
  | H M hM_fin IH =>
    obtain (h | ⟨N₁, N₂, hN₁, hN₂, h_sum⟩) := M.decomposition hM
    · exact h
    · exact h_sum.isGood (IH N₁ h_sum.left_size_lt hN₁) (IH N₂ h_sum.right_size_lt hN₂)

induction hM using IsRegular.inductionOn hM' with
  | graphic h => exact IsGood.graphic h
  | cographic h => exact IsGood.cographic h
  | r10 h => exact IsGood.r10 h
  | sum M₁ M₂ k h_sum _ _ IH₁ IH₂ => exact IsGood.sum k h_sum IH₁ IH₂

induction hM' using Matroid.induction_on_rank generalizing hM with
  | case _ M _ IH =>
    obtain h | ⟨M₁, M₂, h_sum, h₁, h₂, hr₁, hr₂⟩ := hM.decomposition
    · exact IsGood.basic h
    · exact IsGood.sum h_sum (IH M₁ hr₁ h₁) (IH M₂ hr₂ h₂)

apply IsGood.of_minimal_counterexample hM' hM
  exact fun _ _ hR h3 ↦ hR.isGood_of_3Connected h3
